message:
feat(hardening): add global input size limits with fail-open policy

Add configurable limits for stdin and command sizes to prevent DoS:
- max_hook_input_bytes: 256KB default (stdin read limit)
- max_command_bytes: 64KB default (extracted command limit)
- max_findings_per_command: 100 default (output limit)

Oversized inputs are ALLOWED (fail-open) with warning to stderr.
All limits are configurable via [general] config section.

Implements git_safety_guard-99e.10

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
